blocks.text: Wærenskjold Chases Glory at Gent-Wevelgem as Reitan Hunts Houston Leaderboard

A big Saturday for Norwegian sport: Søren Wærenskjold lines up for one of cycling's most explosive classics, while Kristoffer Reitan and Kristoffer Ventura look to make moves at the Houston Open heading into Masters week.
⛳ PGA Tour: Texas Children's Houston Open — Reitan & Ventura tee off, Woodland leads at -13 with Masters places in mind
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 2026 — Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard start; Norway's sprinting ace is built for this crosswind classic
🎾 WTA Charleston Open — Clay swing heats up in South Carolina; key French Open tune-up begins
